title: Kings.
content:
Men are not born kings, but are men renown'd;
    Chose first, confirm'd next, and at last are crown'd.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Kings.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
